label: Scenario part (thing count)
description: Abstract base for scenario parts that deal with a specific thing and a count, such as starting items and scattered things. Adds thingDef, stuff, count, and optional quality fields.

thingDef.label: Thing def
thingDef.description: ThingDef that this part creates, scatters, or references.

stuff.label: Stuff
stuff.description: Material ThingDef used to make the thing, if applicable.

count.label: Count
count.description: Number of things to create or scatter. Defaults to 1.

quality.label: Quality
quality.description: Quality level of the created thing, if applicable. Leave absent to use default quality.
